cheyTaewonSignal.importance: CRITICAL - Day 87 most pivotal supply-side signal
cheyTaewonSignal.summary: SK Group Chairman Chey Tae-won publicly admits RAM prices are 'abnormal'. Considering US fab to expand supply and calm 'chipflation'. Warns sustained high prices will invite new competitors and geopolitical retaliation.
cheyTaewonSignal.shortTermImpact: NONE for Q3-Q4 2026 prices. Fab construction takes 3-5 years. Existing supply squeeze (Inventec 40wks, Meritz 75-80%, Valve take-it-or-leave-it) remains fully in force.
cheyTaewonSignal.longTermImpact: POTENTIALLY SIGNIFICANT for 2027+. Oligopolist chairman's admission validates demand destruction concerns. If followed by actual capex commitment, could improve supply outlook for 2028+.
cheyTaewonSignal.marketReaction: KOSPI -2.6%, Samsung -5.1%, SK Hynix -5.59%. Market interpreting as 'peak margins' signal. Motley Fool confirms memory bear market: $3.3T market cap evaporated.
